name: Malicious Laravel Packages (Full RAT)
description: Malicious Composer packages disguised as Laravel utilities. Full RAT with remote shell, file upload/download, screenshot capture, system profiling. Cross-platform. Activates via Laravel service provider auto-discovery.

affected_packages.name: nhattuanbl/simple-queue
affected_packages.note: Executes at file scope on autoload

affected_packages.name: nhattuanbl/lara-swagger
affected_packages.note: Clean carrier that depends on lara-helper

remediation: Remove all nhattuanbl/* packages from composer.json
Run composer remove nhattuanbl/lara-helper nhattuanbl/simple-queue nhattuanbl/lara-swagger
Audit for helper.php in vendor directory
Assume full compromise - rotate all server credentials
Check Laravel service providers for unknown entries
